title: SimHub eSIM Card Backup (Compatibility Schema)
description: Describes the JSON export/import format used by the SimHub eSIM manager. The top-level document is a JSON ARRAY of card objects. Dates are ISO-8601 strings. This schema is a compatibility reference for third-party (e.g. Android) implementations; it is NOT an official SimHub specification.

ESIMCard.description: One eSIM/subscription card. Unknown keys should be ignored on import; missing keys fall back to the defaults listed below (mirrors the lenient decoder in the source app, so old backups stay importable).

id.description: Stable card UUID. OPTIONAL: older backups omit it. On import a fresh UUID may be assigned to avoid collisions.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number, may include a leading +<calling code>. Default "".

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code (e.g. "CN"). See country_map.json. Default "".

flag.description: Unicode flag emoji. Derivable from countryCode (see country_map.json). Default "\uD83C\uDF10" (globe).

cardBackgroundAssetName.description: Name of the built-in per-country light-trail background asset (e.g. "CardBackgroundUSLighttrail"). Maps to an image in this pack via country_map.json -> cardBackgroundFile. Empty/absent = default material background.

cardColorHex.description: Optional card tint color as a hex string (e.g. "#1E88E5"). Empty/absent = default material background.

cardBackgroundImageData.description: Optional user-supplied custom background image, base64-encoded (compressed JPEG/PNG bytes). Absent for most cards.

carrierAppName.description: Display name of the carrier's companion app.

carrierAppIconURLString.description: URL to the carrier app icon.

carrierAppStoreURLString.description: Store URL for the carrier app.

activationDate.description: ISO-8601 activation date. Defaults to import time if absent.

expiryDate.description: ISO-8601 expiry date. Defaults to activationDate + 30 days if absent.

price.description: Human-readable recurring price text, e.g. "99.00 CNY". Default "".

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code, e.g. "CNY". RMB->CNY and NTD->TWD are normalized.

cyclePaymentMinorUnits.description: Recurring charge in minor units (e.g. cents). 9900 = 99.00.

tags.description: Tag list. Stored internally as newline-joined text.

smdpAddress.description: SM-DP+ server address for the eSIM profile. Default "".

confirmationCode.description: Optional confirmation code. Combined as LPA:1$<smdp>$<activation>$<confirmation>.

eid.description: 32-digit EID of the target device. Default "".

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 creation time. Defaults to import time.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 last-update time. Used for newest-wins sync.

isLongTerm.description: True for long-term / no fixed expiry plans. Default false.

renewDays.description: Legacy renewal interval in days. Inferred from activation->expiry if absent.

renewalIntervalValue.description: Renewal interval count in the given unit (>=1).
